# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Deploy to production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_ENV_VAR: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_ENV_VAR }}
        run: |
          # Add your deployment script here, e.g., using a custom CLI tool or SSH
          ./deploy-to-prod.sh
